name: ExtensionActorDefinition_Purpose
title: R5: Why this actor definition is defined (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActorDefinition.purpose` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActorDefinition.purpose` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ActorDefinition.purpose` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActorDefinition.purpose` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.purpose` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Why this actor definition is defined (new)
element.comment:
Element `ActorDefinition.purpose` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.purpose` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This element does not describe the usage of the actor definition. Instead, it provides traceability of ''why'' the resource is either needed or ''why'' it is defined as it is.  This may be used to point to source materials or specifications that drove the structure of this actor definition.

element.short: Why this actor definition is defined
element.definition: Explanation of why this actor definition is needed and why it has been designed as it has.
